title: MCP Security, Prompt Injection, and Supply Chain Trust · Skill Brief: Server Trust
summary: Threat-model an MCP server consuming untrusted content and exposing write tools. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext server trust increment in an MCP security test suite and operating policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Inspect server provenance, dependencies, update channel, permissions, and data destinations.
Map scopes and approvals to narrow tools and user intent.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
